name: livespec
description: Claude Code Driver for livespec: thin SKILL.md bindings exposing /livespec:seed, /livespec:propose-change, /livespec:critique, /livespec:revise, /livespec:doctor, /livespec:prune-history, /livespec:next, and /livespec:help. The harness-neutral prose and the reference spec-side CLIs ship with livespec core (install livespec@livespec alongside this Driver).
